basic_details.job_title: DLSA Virudhunagar Recruitment 2026 - Apply Offline for Chief Legal, Assistant Legal and More Posts
basic_details.organization_name: District Legal Services Authority Virudhunagar (DLSA Virudhunagar)
basic_details.post_name: Chief Legal, Assistant Legal and More
basic_details.short_information: The latest District Legal Services Authority Virudhunagar (DLSA Virudhunagar) Legal Aid Defense Counsel Notification 2026 has been released on the official website https://virudhunagar.dcourts.gov.in. A total of 5 vacancies have been announced through the DLSA Virudhunagar Legal Aid Defense Counsel Recruitment 2026.

age_limit.details: Minimum Age: 18 years Maximum Age: Not specified in the provided data. Age Relaxation: Not specified in the provided data.

qualification.education_qualification: Cleared All India Bar Council examination (AIBE), Enrolled as an Advocate with any State Bar Council
qualification.details: Chief Legal Aid Defense Counsel: Practice in Criminal Law for at least 10 years. Handled at least 30 criminal trials in Sessions Court (relaxable). Cleared All India Bar Council exam (AIBE). Enrolled as Advocate. Local resident of Virudhunagar District. Leadership and office management ability. Deputy Chief Legal Aid Defense Counsel: Practice in Criminal Law for at least 7 years. Handled at least 20 criminal trials in Sessions Court. Cleared AIBE. Enrolled as Advocate. Local resident of Virudhunagar District. Legal research and IT proficiency. Assistant Legal Aid Defense Counsel: Practice in Criminal Law for 1 to 3 years. Cleared AIBE. Enrolled as Advocate. Local resident of Virudhunagar District. Research, drafting skills and IT knowledge. | General Eligibility: Citizen of India, Local resident of Virudhunagar District, Cleared All India Bar Council examination (AIBE), Enrolled as an Advocate with any State Bar Council.

vacancy_details.Post Name: Deputy Chief Legal Aid Defense Counsel

selection_process: Merit-based shortlisting of applications Written test and/or Interview Final approval by Executive Chairman
Tamil Nadu State Legal Services Authority
how_to_apply: Candidates who wish to apply for DLSA Virudhunagar Various Posts Recruitment 2026 through offline mode should follow the steps below.
Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Download the application form from the official website: https://virudhunagar.dcourts.gov.in/.
Fill the application form carefully with correct information.
Attach self-attested copies of required documents such as photograph, signature, ID proof, and certificates.
Check all details carefully before submission.
Send the completed application form to the address mentioned in the notification through Speed Post / Registered Post or as instructed.
Ensure the application reaches before the last date: 13-05-2026.
Keep a photocopy of the submitted application form for future reference.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for DLSA Virudhunagar Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The last date for the receipt of applications for the DLSA Virudhunagar Legal Aid Defense Counsel posts is 13th May 2026. Ensure your application reaches the authority before this date.

faq.question: Q2. How many vacancies are available for Legal Aid Defense Counsel posts?
faq.answer: There are a total of 5 vacancies for the Legal Aid Defense Counsel posts announced by the District Legal Services Authority Virudhunagar.

faq.question: Q3. What is the minimum age requirement for these posts?
faq.answer: The minimum age requirement for all the Legal Aid Defense Counsel posts is 18 years.

faq.question: Q4. Is there any application fee for DLSA Virudhunagar Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee mentioned for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) for this recruitment drive.

faq.question: Q5. What is the salary offered for the Legal Aid Defense Counsel positions?
faq.answer: The selected candidates will receive a monthly salary ranging from Rs. 25,000/- to Rs. 70,000/-.

faq.question: Q6. What are the essential qualifications for the Legal Aid Defense Counsel posts?
faq.answer: Candidates must be citizens of India, local residents of Virudhunagar District, have cleared the All India Bar Council examination (AIBE), and be enrolled as an Advocate with any State Bar Council.

faq.question: Q7. What is the application mode for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The application mode for the DLSA Virudhunagar Recruitment 2026 is offline. Candidates need to download the form and send it via post.

faq.question: Q8. What is the selection process for these posts?
faq.answer: The selection process involves merit-based shortlisting of applications, followed by a written test and/or interview, and final approval by the Executive Chairman, Tamil Nadu State Legal Services Authority.

faq.question: Q9. Does the recruitment specify a maximum age limit?
faq.answer: The provided data specifies a minimum age of 18 years but does not mention a maximum age limit for these posts.

faq.question: Q10. Where can I find the official notification and application form?
faq.answer: The official notification and application form can be downloaded from the official website of the District Legal Services Authority Virudhunagar, which is https://virudhunagar.dcourts.gov.in/.
